## Tau fresh UI handoff Actions apply proof disposition

This disposable issue was created by the apply-gated Tau handoff dispatch workflow from the fresh browser-derived COMPLIANCE start handoff.

Evidence artifacts in the Tau repo working tree:

- `experiments/loop2-alignment/proofs/tau_chat_ui_20260628T132000Z/summary.json`
- `experiments/goal-locked-subagents/proofs/ui-handoff-command-loop-20260628T132100Z/summary.json`
- `experiments/goal-locked-subagents/proofs/github-actions-fresh-ui-handoff-apply-20260628T132529Z/run.json`
- `experiments/goal-locked-subagents/proofs/github-actions-fresh-ui-handoff-apply-20260628T132529Z/artifacts/tau-handoff-actions-28323704277/command-loop-receipt.json`
- `experiments/goal-locked-subagents/proofs/github-actions-fresh-ui-handoff-apply-20260628T132529Z/artifacts/tau-handoff-actions-28323704277/github-transport.json`

Concrete receipt fields:

- browser COMPLIANCE proof `mocked:false`, `live:true`
- browser handoff next agent `reviewer`
- command loop `ok:true`, `mocked:false`, `live:true`
- selected agent `reviewer`
- terminal agent `human`
- GitHub Actions run conclusion `success`
- GitHub transport `applied:true`
- GitHub transport `dry_run:false`
- GitHub issue create exit code `0`

This closes only the disposable fresh UI handoff Actions apply proof issue. It does not claim final Sparta Chat readiness or unbounded autonomous subagent operation.
Closing disposable fresh UI handoff Actions apply proof issue after artifact capture.
